gist.headline: Watering the Greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just did its daily rounds, checking the health and metrics of all the amazing community apps in our greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in the APPS registry.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app showcase up-to-date with the latest usage metrics and health statuses.
gist.visual_concept: A greenhouse setting representing the app ecosystem. Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot acting as gardeners, checking the health of various code-plants (representing the apps).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, flying inside a warm greenhouse and checking on glowing code-plants in lime green (#ecf874) pots. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holds a clipboard, recording plant health metrics. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
